ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "schedule_url" TEXT /* URL to the course schedule */,
  "exam_info_url" TEXT /* URL to the exam information */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator teaching the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES course_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the course type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the educator belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the educator */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the educator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the educator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or academic history of the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study for the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative Grade Point Average */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., registered, dropped, completed) */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance percentage of the student in the course */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Student feedback for the course */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., syllabus, schedule, exam info) */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL to the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator who uploaded the material */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the material file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
